title: When Something Goes Wrong
drDigitalIntro: Computers can act up — apps freeze, things slow down, errors pop up. Don't panic! Most problems have simple solutions. The most powerful fix? Restarting. Turn it off and on again. This solves the majority of computer problems by clearing the computer's temporary memory. If restarting doesn't help, the next step is to identify what's causing the problem. Let's practice handling a frozen app!

playgroundTask.scenario: The browser is frozen and not responding

steps.say: There's an error on the screen. Click Dismiss to read it first.
The browser app is frozen. Open Task Manager to see what's running.
The browser shows 'Not Responding' — click Force Quit to stop it.

drDigitalSuccess: You fixed the frozen app! Task Manager shows what's running so you can force-quit stuck apps.
drDigitalHint: Open Task Manager, find the Not Responding app, and click Force Quit.
